response.justification: Candidate has strong foundational technical experience (20 years) and MIT credentials, but lacks the core requirement: demonstrated recognized expertise in AI with built products/platforms. Current AI work at re:cinq (started April 2025) is infrastructure-focused (MCP code generators), not strategic. No evidence of thought leadership in AI strategy, customer/partner advisory relationships, or cloud platform strategy experience needed for director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Solid 20 years of diverse technical experience across web, mobile, infrastructure, and embedded systems with strong MIT foundation
Proven open source leadership (GISCollective used by Green Map, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) demonstrating community respect and thought sharing
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure and agent frameworks at current re:cinq role provides fresh AI context
concerns: AI expertise is brand-new (April 2025) with infrastructure/tooling focus rather than AI strategy or business impact—role requires recognized AI thought leadership
No demonstrated history of building or shipping AI-powered products, ML platforms, or advising customers on cutting-edge AI adoption
Limited evidence of director-level strategic influence, advisory relationships, or identifying future product/platform states at organizational level
